harvest(address).notice: Pull accrued yield into `vault`. Returns the amount delivered (assets).

pendingYield(address).notice: View the yield accrued and claimable so far, without harvesting.

rateBps().notice: annual yield rate in basis points (e.g. 830 = 8.30%)

start(address).notice: initialize the accrual clock for a vault (called once by the vault)
